name: movie_search
description: Search movies via TMDb (info, cast, ratings) or find full movies on YouTube with AI classification and video analysis
help_example:
movie inception — info about a movie
movie french comedy — discover by genre/language
movie find french comedy — find full movies on YouTube + analyze
movie new french comedy — force fresh YouTube search
movie cache — list cached movies
movie 5 korean thriller — find up to 5 movies
